core: Deep Strike , Feel No Pain 5+ , Leader

datasheet.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in this unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack’s Ballistic skill or Weapon skill characteristics and/or all modifiers to the Hit roll
datasheet.name: Captain-General

datasheet.text: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase , you can select one of the following to take effect until the end of the phase: This model’s Watcher’s Axe melee weapon has an Attacks characteristic of 12. This model has a 2+ invulnerable save .
datasheet.name: Moment Shackle

items: This model’s Watcher’s Axe melee weapon has an Attacks characteristic of 12.
This model has a 2+ invulnerable save .
